one_time_description: Claim settlement / Water Compensation Fund revenue recognized
economic_notes: Buffalo Crossing Convenience & Gas Bar operated as consolidated commercial entity. Dakota Development Corporation consolidated. Bison herd maintained. Investments in Keseechiwan Holdings Inc. (Swift Current Casino, 8.3%) and IMI Brokerage Limited Partnership (4.5%).
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Province is Saskatchewan. Four consolidated subsidiaries: CMHC Housing, Care Home Inc., Dakota Development Corporation, Buffalo Crossing Convenience & Gas Bar. Net debt position of -3,717,990. Large deferred revenue balance of $10.6M primarily from ISC capital projects. Claim settlement / Water Compensation Fund of $178,162 recognized as revenue. CEBA loan of $60,000 with potential $20,000 forgiveness. New accounting standards adopted April 1, 2022 (PS 3280 and PS 3450) applied prospectively. Ottawa Trust Funds of $482,343 held by Government of Canada. Significant capital spending in year ($3.4M) including roads and housing.
